original_do_not_merge.reason: Test 1 (contradiction test) applies: entity_type differs — "department" vs "agency department" — which is a strong identity field. Per Identity Merge Canon, if any strong identity field differs the records are distinct regardless of name similarity. The first record also has documented part_of_agency relations to MTA and multiple source supports, while the second is isolated; merging would corrupt the graph.
